about.label: About Backgammon
about.title: One of the Oldest Board Games
about.p1: Backgammon has been played for over 5,000 years. It uniquely combines strategy and luck — no two games are ever the same.
about.p2: In Iceland, backgammon (kotra) has been played for centuries and is part of our cultural heritage. The association works to grow the game and connect players.
